output: Nevertheless We exhort the loved ones of God to observe justice and fairness, and to do that which would prompt the friends of God to evince tender mercy and compassion towards each other.

input: انشآءالله کلّ مویّد شوند بر آنچه از لسان حقّ جاریشده.
output: God grant that all men may be graciously aided to observe that which the Tongue of the One true God hath uttered.

input: و اگر آنچه ذکر شد عمل نمایند البتّه حقّ جلّ جلاله از سماء فضل ضعف آنرا عطا میفرماید.
output: And if they put into practice what We have set forth, God—exalted be His glory—will assuredly double their portion through the heaven of His bounty.

input: انّه هو الفضّال الغفور الرّحیم.
output: Verily He is the Generous, the Forgiving, the Compassionate.

input: الحمد لله العلیّ العظیم.
output: Praise be unto God, the Most Exalted, the Most Great.

input: ولکن اجرای این امور برجال بیت عدل محوّل شده تا بمقتضیات وقت و حکمت عمل نمایند.
output: Nevertheless the conduct of these affairs hath been entrusted to the men of the House of Justice that they may enforce them according to the exigencies of the time and the dictates of wisdom.

input: مجدّد کلّ را وصیّت مینمائیم بعدل و انصاف و محبّت و رضا.
output: Once again We exhort all believers to observe justice and fairness and to show forth love and contentment.

input: انّهم اهل البهآء و اصحاب السّفینه الحمرآء.
output: They are indeed the people of Bahá, the companions of the Crimson Ark.

input: علیهم سلام الله مولی الاسمآء و فاطر السّمآء.
output: Upon them be the peace of God, the Lord of all Names, the Creator of the heavens.

input: هو النّاطق بالحقّ فی ملکوت البیان
output: He is the One Who speaketh through the power of Truth in the Kingdom of Utterance

input: یا مشارق العدل و الانصاف و مطالع الصّدق و الالطاف!
output: O ye the embodiments of justice and equity and the manifestations of uprightness and of heavenly bounties!

input: انّ المظلوم یبکی و یقول ینوح و ینادی الهی الهی زیّن رووس اولیائک باکلیل الانقطاع و هیاکلهم بطراز التّقوی.
output: In tears and lamenting, this Wronged One calleth aloud and saith: O God, my God! Adorn the heads of Thy loved ones with the crown of detachment and attire their temples with the raiment of righteousness.

input: ینبغی لاهل البهآء ان ینصروا الرّبّ ببیانهم و یعظوا النّاس باعمالهم و اخلاقهم اثر الاعمال انفذ من اثر الاقوال.
output: It behooveth the people of Bahá to render the Lord victorious through the power of their utterance and to admonish the people by their goodly deeds and character, inasmuch as deeds exert greater influence than words.

input: یا حیدر قبل علی!
output: O Haydar-'Alí!

input: علیک ثنآء الله و بهائه.
output: Upon thee be the praise of God and His glory.

input: قل انّ الانسان یرتفع بامانته و عفّته و عقله و اخلاقه و یهبط بخیانته و کذبه و جهله و نفاقه.
output: Say: Honesty, virtue, wisdom and a saintly character redound to the exaltation of man, while dishonesty, imposture, ignorance and hypocrisy lead to his abasement. By My life!

input: لعمری لا یسمو الانسان بالزّینه و الثّروه بل بالآداب و المعرفه.
output: By My life! Man's distinction lieth not in ornaments or wealth, but rather in virtuous behavior and true understanding.

input: اهل ایران اکثری بکذب و ظنون تربیت شده‌اند.
output: Most of the people in Persia are steeped in deception and idle fancy.

input: کجاست مقام آن نفوس و مقام رجالی که از خلیج اسماء گذشته‌اند و بر شاطی بحر تقدیس خرگاه افراشته‌اند.
output: How great the difference between the condition of these people and the station of such valiant souls as have passed beyond the sea of names and pitched their tents upon the shores of the ocean of detachment.

input: باری نفوس موجوده لایق اصغاء تغرّدات حمامات فردوس اعلی نبوده و نیستند مگر قلیلی.
output: Indeed none but a few of the existing generation hath yet earned the merit of hearkening unto the warblings of the doves of the all-highest Paradise.

input: و قلیل من عبادی الشّکور.
output: Few of My servants are truly thankful.

input: اکثری از عباد باوهام انس دارند.
output: People for the most part delight in superstitions.

input: یک قطره از دریای وهم را بر بحر ایقان ترجیح میدهند.
output: They regard a single drop of the sea of delusion as preferable to an ocean of certitude.

input: از معنی محروم باسم متمسّکند و از مشرق آیات الهی ممنوع و بظنون متشبّث.
output: By holding fast unto names they deprive themselves of the inner reality and by clinging to vain imaginings they are kept back from the Dayspring of heavenly signs.

input: انشآءالله آن جناب در جمیع احوال مویّد باشند بر کسر اصنام اوهام و خرق سبحات انام.
output: God grant you may be graciously aided under all conditions to shatter the idols of superstition and to tear away the veils of the imaginations of men.

input: الامر بید الله مظهر الوحی و الالهام و مالک یوم القیام.
output: Authority lieth in the grasp of God, the Fountainhead of revelation and inspiration and the Lord of the Day of Resurrection.

input: آنچه جناب مذکور در بارهٴ بعضی از مبلّغین ذکر نموده اصغا شد.
output: We heard that which the person in question hath mentioned regarding certain teachers of the Faith.

input: قد نطق بالحقّ.
output: Indeed he hath spoken truly.

input: بعضی از نفوس غافله در بلاد باسم حقّ سائرند و بتضییع امرش مشغول و اسم آن را نصرت و تبلیغ گذاشته‌اند مع آنکه انجم شرائط مبلّغین از آفاق سموات الواح الهی مشرق و لائح.
output: Some heedless souls roam the lands in the name of God, actively engaged in ruining His Cause, and call it promoting and teaching the Word of God; and this notwithstanding that the qualifications of the teachers of the Faith, like unto stars, shine resplendent throughout the heavens of the divine Tablets.

input: هر منصفی گواه و هر بصیری آگاه که حقّ جلّ جلاله در لیالی و ایّام بآنچه سبب ارتفاع مقامات و مراتب انسان است تکلّم فرموده و تعلیم نموده.
output: Every fair-minded person testifieth and every man of insight is well aware that the One true God—exalted be His glory—hath unceasingly set forth and expounded that which will elevate the station and will exalt the rank of the children of men.

input: اهل بها چون شمع مابین جمع مشرق و لائحند و باراده الله متمسّک.
output: The people of Bahá burn brightly amidst the gatherings even as a candle and hold fast unto that which God hath purposed.

input: این مقام مالک مقامهاست.
output: This station standeth supreme above all stations.

input: طوبی لمن نبذ ما عند العالم رجآء ما عند الله مالک القدم.
output: Well is it with him who hath cast away the things that the people of the world possess, yearning for that which pertaineth unto God, the Sovereign Lord of eternity.

input: قل الهی الهی ترانی طائفاً حول ارادتک و ناظراً الی افق جودک و منتظراً تجلّیات انوار نیّر عطائک.
output: Say: O God, my God! Thou beholdest me circling round Thy Will with mine eyes turned towards the horizon of Thy bounty, eagerly awaiting the revelation of the effulgent splendors of the sun of Thy favors.

input: اسالک یا محبوب افئده العارفین و مقصود المقرّبین ان تجعل اولیائک منقطعین عن اراداتهم متمسّکین بارادتک.
output: I beg of Thee, O Beloved of every understanding heart and the Desire of such as have near access unto Thee, to grant that Thy loved ones may become wholly detached from their own inclinations, holding fast unto that which pleaseth Thee.

input: ای ربّ زیّنهم بطراز التّقوی و نوّرهم بنور الانقطاع ثمّ ایّدهم بجنود الحکمه و البیان لاعلآء کلمتک بین خلقک و اظهار امرک بین عبادک.
output: Attire them, O Lord, with the robe of righteousness and illumine them with the splendors of the light of detachment. Summon then to their assistance the hosts of wisdom and utterance that they may exalt Thy Word amongst Thy creatures and proclaim Thy Cause amidst Thy servants.

input: انّک انت المقتدر علی ما تشآء و فی قبضتک زمام الامور.
output: Verily, potent art Thou to do what Thou willest, and within Thy grasp lie the reins of all affairs.

input: لا اله الّا انت العزیز الغفور.
output: No God is there but Thee, the Mighty, the Ever-Forgiving.

input: یا ایّها النّاظر الی الوجه!
output: O thou who hast turned thy gaze towards My face!

input: این ایّام وارد شد آنچه که سبب حزن اکبر گشت.
output: In these days there occurred that which hath plunged Me into dire sadness.

input: از بعضی از ظالمین که خود را بحقّ نسبت میدهند ظاهر شد آنچه که فرائص صدق و امانت و عدل و انصاف مرتعد.
output: Certain wrong-doers who profess allegiance to the Cause of God committed such deeds as have caused the limbs of sincerity, of honesty, of justice, of equity to quake.

input: مع آنکه کمال عنایت و عطا در بارهٴ شخص معلوم ظاهر و مجری گشت عمل نمود آنچه را که عین الله گریست.
output: One known individual to whom the utmost kindness and favor had been extended perpetrated such acts as have brought tears to the eye of God.

input: و از قبل ذکر شد آنچه که سبب آگاهی و انتباه است چند سنه ستر نمودیم که شاید متنبّه شود و راجع گردد.
output: Formerly We uttered words of warning and premonition, then for a number of years We kept the matter secret that haply he might take heed and repent.

input: اثری ظاهر نه.
output: But all to no purpose.

input: بالاخره امام وجوه خلق بر تضییع امر الله قیام نمود.
output: In the end he bent his energies upon vilifying the Cause of God before the eyes of all men.

input: ستر انصاف را درید نه رحم بر خود و نه بر امر الله نمود.
output: He tore the veil of fairness asunder and felt sympathy neither for himself nor for the Cause of God.

input: حال حزن اعمال بعض دیگر بر حزن اعمال او غلبه نموده.
output: Now, however, the deeds of certain individuals have brought sorrows far more grievous than those which the deeds of the former had caused.

input: از حقّ بطلب نفوس غافله را تایید فرماید بر رجوع و انابه.
output: Beseech thou God, the True One, that He may graciously enable the heedless to retract and repent.

input: انّه هو الغفّار و هو الفضّال الکریم.
output: Verily He is the Forgiving, the Bountiful, the Most Generous.

input: این ایّام باید کل باتّحاد و اتّفاق تمسّک نمایند و بنصرت امر الله مشغول گردند که شاید نفوس غافله فائز شوند بآنچه که سبب رستگاری ابدیست.
output: In these days it is incumbent upon everyone to adhere tenaciously unto unity and concord and to labor diligently in promoting the Cause of God, that perchance the wayward souls may attain that which will lead unto abiding prosperity.

input: باری اختلاف احزاب سبب و علّت ضعف شده.
output: In brief, dissensions among various sects have opened the way to weakness.

input: هر حزبی راهی اخذ نموده و بحبلی تمسّک جسته.
output: Each sect hath picked out a way for itself and is clinging to a certain cord.

input: مع کوری و نادانی خود را صاحب بصر و علم میدانند.
output: Despite manifest blindness and ignorance they pride themselves on their insight and knowledge.

input: از جمله عرفای ملّت اسلام بعضی از آن نفوس متشبّثند بآنچه که سبب کسالت و انزواست.
output: Among them are mystics who bear allegiance to the Faith of Islám, some of whom indulge in that which leadeth to idleness and seclusion.

input: لعمر الله از مقام بکاهد و بر غرور بیفزاید.
output: I swear by God! It lowereth man's station and maketh him swell with pride.

input: از انسان باید ثمری پدید آید.
output: Man must bring forth fruit.

input: انسان بی‌ثمر بفرمودهٴ حضرت روح بمثابهٴ شجر بی‌ثمر است و شجر بی‌ثمر لائق نار.
output: One who yieldeth no fruit is, in the words of the Spirit, like unto a fruitless tree, and a fruitless tree is fit but for the fire.

input: آن نفوس در مقامات توحید ذکر نموده‌اند آنچه را که سبب اعظم است از برای ظهور کسالت و اوهام عباد.
output: That which the aforesaid persons have mentioned concerning the stations of Divine Unity will conduce in no small measure to idleness and vain imaginings.

input: فی‌الحقیقه فرق را برداشته‌اند و خود را حقّ پنداشته‌اند حقّ مقدّس است از کل.
output: These mortal men have evidently set aside the differences of station and have come to regard themselves as God, while God is immeasurably exalted above all things.

input: در کل آیات او ظاهر آیات از اوست نه او در.
output: Every created being however revealeth His signs which are but emanations from Him and not His Own Self.

input: دفتر دنیا کل مذکور و مشهود نقش عالم کتابیست اعظم.
output: All these signs are reflected and can be seen in the book of existence, and the scrolls that depict the shape and pattern of the universe are indeed a most great book.

input: هر صاحب بصری ادراک مینماید آنچه را که سبب وصول بصراط مستقیم و نبا عظیم است.
output: Therein every man of insight can perceive that which would lead to the Straight Path and would enable him to attain the Great Announcement.

input: در تجلّیات آفتاب مشاهده نمائید انوارش عالم را احاطه نموده ولکن تجلّیات از او و ظهور اوست بنفس او نه نفس او.
output: Consider the rays of the sun whose light hath encompassed the world. The rays emanate from the sun and reveal its nature, but are not the sun itself.

input: آنچه در ارض مشاهده میشود حاکی از قدرت و علم و فضل اوست و او مقدّس از کل.
output: Whatsoever can be discerned on earth amply demonstrateth the power of God, His knowledge and the outpourings of His bounty, while He Himself is immeasurably exalted above all creatures.

input: حضرت مسیح میفرماید باطفال عطا فرمودی آنچه را که علما و حکما از آن محرومند.
output: Christ saith: Thou hast granted to children that whereof the learned and the wise are deprived.

input: حکیم سبزواری گفته اذن واعیه یافت نمیشود والّا زمزمهٴ سدرهٴ طور در هر شجر موجود.
output: The sage of Sabzívar hath said: Alas! Attentive ears are lacking, otherwise the whisperings of the Sinaic Bush could be heard from every tree.

input: در لوح یکی از حکما که از بسیطه الحقیقه سوال نموده بحکیم مذکور مشهور خطاب نمودیم اگر این کلمه فی‌الحقیقه از تو بوده چرا ندای سدرهٴ انسان را که از اعلی مقام عالم مرتفعست نشنیدی.
output: In a Tablet to a man of wisdom who had made enquiry as to the meaning of Elementary Reality, We addressed this famous sage in these words: If this saying is truly thine, how is it that thou hast failed to hearken unto the Call which the Tree of Man hath raised from the loftiest heights of the world?

input: اگر شنیدی و حفظ جان و خوف تو را از جواب منع نمود چنین شخص قابل ذکر نبوده و نیست و اگر نشنیدی از سمع محروم بوده‌ئی.
output: If thou didst hear the Call yet fear and the desire to preserve thy life prompted thee to remain heedless to it, thou art such a person as hath never been nor is worthy of mention; if thou hast not heard it, then thou art bereft of the sense of hearing.

input: باری در قول فخر عالمند و در عمل ننگ امم.
output: In brief, such men are they whose words are the pride of the world, and whose deeds are the shame of the nations.

input: انّا نفخنا فی الصّور و هو قلمی الاعلی و انصعق منه العباد الّا من حفظه الله فضلاً من عنده و هو الفضّال القدیم.
output: He is the Lord of bounty, the Ancient of Days.

input: قل یا معشر العلمآء!
output: Say: O concourse of divines!

input: هل تعترضون علی قلم اذ ارتفع صریره استعدّ ملکوت البیان لاصغائه و خضع کلّ ذکر عند ذکره العزیز العظیم.
output: Pronounce ye censure against this Pen unto which, as soon as it raised its shrill voice, the kingdom of utterance prepared itself to hearken, and before whose mighty and glorious theme every other theme hath paled into insignificance?

input: اتّقوا الله و لا تتّبعوا الظّنون و الاوهام اتّبعوا من اتاکم بعلم مبین و یقین متین.
output: Fear ye God and follow not your idle fancies and corrupt imaginings, but rather follow Him Who is come unto you invested with undeniable knowledge and unshakeable certitude.

input: سبحان‌الله کنز انسان بیان اوست این مظلوم از اظهار آن توقّف نموده چه که منکران در کمینگاهان مترصّدند.
output: Glorified be God! Man's treasure is his utterance, yet this Wronged One hath withheld His Tongue, for the disbelievers are lying in ambush;

input: الحفظ من الله ربّ العالمین.
output: however, protection is afforded by God, the Lord of all worlds.

input: انّا توکّلنا علیه و فوّضنا الامور الیه و هو حسبنا و حسب کلّ شیء.
output: Verily, in Him have We placed Our trust and unto Him have We committed all affairs. All-Sufficient is He for Us and for all created things.

input: هو الّذی باذنه و امره اشرق نیّر الاقتدار من افق العالم.
output: He is the One by Whose leave, and through the potency of Whose command, the Daystar of sovereign might hath shone resplendent above the horizon of the world.

input: طوبی لمن شهد و عرف و ویل للمعرضین و المنکرین.
output: Well is it with him who perceiveth and recognizeth the Truth and woe betide the froward and the faithless.

input: ولکن این مظلوم حکما را دوست داشته و میدارد.
output: This Wronged One hath invariably treated the wise with affection.

input: یعنی آنان که حکمتشان محض قول نبوده بلکه اثر و ثمر در عالم از ایشان ظاهر شده و باقی مانده.
output: By the wise is meant men whose knowledge is not confined to mere words and whose lives have been fruitful and have produced enduring results.

input: بر کل احترام این نفوس مبارکه لازم.
output: It is incumbent upon everyone to honor these blessed souls.

input: طوبی للعاملین و طوبی للعارفین و طوبی لمن انصف فی الامور و تمسّک بحبل عدلی المتین.
output: Happy are they that observe God's precepts; happy are they that have recognized the Truth; happy are they that judge with fairness in all matters and hold fast to the Cord of My inviolable Justice.

input: اهل ایران از حافظ و معین گذشته‌اند و باوهام جهلا متمسّک و مشغول.
output: The people of Persia have turned away from Him Who is the Protector and the Helper. They are clinging to and have enmeshed themselves in the vain imaginings of the foolish.

input: بشانی باوهام متشبّثند که فصل آن ممکن نه مگر بذراعی قدرت حقّ جلّ جلاله.
output: So firmly do they adhere to superstitions that naught can sever them therefrom save the potent arm of God—exalted is His glory.

input: از حقّ بطلب تا حجبات احزاب را باصبع اقتدار بردارد تا کل اسباب حفظ و علوّ و سموّ را بیابند و بشطر دوست یکتا بشتابند.
output: Beseech thou the Almighty that He may remove with the fingers of divine power the veils which have shut out the diverse peoples and kindreds, that they may attain the things that are conducive to security, progress and advancement and may hasten forth towards the incomparable Friend.

input: ورق اوّل
output: first leaf

input: براستی میگویم حفظ مبین و حصن متین از برای عموم اهل عالم خشیه الله بوده.
output: Verily I say: The fear of God hath ever been a sure defense and a safe stronghold for all the peoples of the world.

input: ورق دوم
output: second leaf

input: قلم اعلی در این حین مظاهر قدرت و مشارق اقتدار یعنی ملوک و سلاطین و روسا و امرا و علما و عرفا را نصیحت میفرماید و بدین و بتمسّک بآن وصیّت مینماید.
output: The Pen of the Most High exhorteth, at this moment, the manifestations of authority and the sources of power, namely the kings, the sovereigns, the presidents, the rulers, the divines and the wise, and enjoineth them to uphold the cause of religion, and to cleave unto it.

input: آن است سبب بزرگ از برای نظم جهان و اطمینان من فی الامکان.
output: Religion is verily the chief instrument for the establishment of order in the world and of tranquility amongst its peoples.

input: براستی میگویم آنچه از مقام بلند دین کاست بر غفلت اشرار افزود و نتیجه بالاخره هرج و مرج است.
output: Verily I say: The greater the decline of religion, the more grievous the waywardness of the ungodly. This cannot but lead in the end to chaos and confusion.

input: ورق سوّم
output: third leaf

input: یا بن الانسان لو تکون ناظراً الی الفضل ضع ما ینفعک و خذ ما ینتفع به العباد.
output: O son of man! If thine eyes be turned towards mercy, forsake the things that profit thee and cleave unto that which will profit mankind.

input: ورق چهارم
output: fourth leaf

input: یا حزب الله از حقّ جلّ جلاله بطلبید مظاهر سطوت و قوّت را از شرّ نفس و هوی حفظ فرماید و بانوار عدل و هدی منوّر دارد.
output: O people of God! Beseech ye the True One—glorified be His Name—that He may graciously shield the manifestations of dominion and power from the suggestions of self and desire and shed the radiance of justice and guidance upon them.

input: از حضرت محمّد شاه مع علوّ مقام دو امر منکر ظاهر اوّل نفی سلطان ممالک فضل و عطا حضرت نقطهٴ اولی و ثانی قتل سیّد مدینهٴ تدبیر و انشاء.
output: His Majesty Muhammad Sháh, despite the excellence of his rank, committed two heinous deeds. One was the order to banish the Lord of the Realms of Grace and Bounty, the Primal Point; and the other, the murder of the Prince of the City of Statesmanship and Literary Accomplishment.

input: باری خطا و عطای ایشان عظیم است.
output: The faults of kings, like their favors, can be great.

input: سلطانی که غرور اقتدار و اختیار او را از عدل منع ننماید و نعمت و ثروت و عزّت و صفوف و الوف او را از تجلّیات نیّر انصاف محروم نسازد او در ملا اعلی دارای مقام اعلی و رتبهٴ علیاست.
output: A king who is not deterred by the vainglory of power and authority from observing justice, nor is deprived of the splendors of the daystar of equity by luxury, riches, glory or the marshalling of hosts and legions shall occupy a high rank and a sublime station amongst the Concourse on high.

input: بر کل اعانت و محبّت آن وجود مبارک لازم.
output: It is incumbent upon everyone to extend aid and to manifest kindness to so noble a soul.

input: طوبی لملک ملک زمام نفسه و غلب غضبه و فضّل العدل علی الظّلم و الانصاف علی الاعتساف.
output: Well is it with the king who keepeth a tight hold on the reins of his passion, restraineth his anger and preferreth justice and fairness to injustice and tyranny.

input: ورق پنجم
output: fifth leaf

input: عطیّهٴ کبری و نعمت عظمی در رتبهٴ اولی خرد بوده و هست.
output: Above all else, the greatest gift and the most wondrous blessing hath ever been and will continue to be Wisdom.

input: اوست حافظ وجود.
output: It is man's unfailing Protector.

input: و معین و ناصر او.
output: It aideth him and strengtheneth him.

input: خرد پیک رحمن است و مظهر اسم علّام .
output: Wisdom is God's Emissary and the Revealer of His Name the Omniscient.

input: باو مقام انسان ظاهر و مشهود.
output: Through it the loftiness of man's station is made manifest and evident.

input: اوست دانا و معلّم اوّل در دبستان وجود.
output: It is all-knowing and the foremost Teacher in the school of existence.

input: و اوست راهنما و دارای رتبهٴ علیا.
output: It is the Guide and is invested with high distinction.

input: از یمن تربیت او عنصر خاک دارای گوهر پاک شد و از افلاک گذشت.
output: Thanks to its educating influence earthly beings have become imbued with a gem-like spirit which outshineth the heavens.

input: اوست خطیب اوّل در مدینهٴ عدل و در سال نه جهان را ببشارت ظهور منوّر نمود.
output: In the city of justice it is the unrivalled Speaker Who, in the year nine, illumined the world with the joyful tidings of this Revelation.

input: و اوست دانای یکتا که در اوّل دنیا بمرقاه معانی ارتقا جست و چون بارادهٴ رحمانی بر منبر بیان مستوی بدو حرف نطق فرمود.
output: And it was this peerless Source of wisdom that at the beginning of the foundation of the world ascended the stair of inner meaning and when enthroned upon the pulpit of utterance, through the operation of the divine Will, proclaimed two words.

input: از اوّل بشارت وعد ظاهر و از ثانی خوف وعید.
output: The first heralded the promise of reward, while the second voiced the ominous warning of punishment.

input: و از وعد و وعید بیم و امید باهر.
output: The promise gave rise to hope and the warning begat fear.

input: و باین دو اساس نظم عالم محکم و برقرار.
output: Thus the basis of world order hath been firmly established upon these twin principles.

input: تعالی الحکیم ذو الفضل العظیم.
output: Exalted is the Lord of Wisdom, the Possessor of Great Bounty.

input: ورق ششم
output: sixth leaf

input: سراج عباد داد است او را ببادهای مخالف ظلم و اعتساف خاموش منمائید.
output: The light of men is Justice. Quench it not with the contrary winds of oppression and tyranny.

input: و مقصود از آن ظهور اتّحاد است بین عباد.
output: The purpose of justice is the appearance of unity among men.

input: در این کلمهٴ علیا بحر حکمت الهی موّاج دفاتر عالم تفسیر آن را کفایت ننماید.
output: The ocean of divine wisdom surgeth within this exalted word, while the books of the world cannot contain its inner significance.

input: اگر عالم باین طراز مزیّن گردد شمس کلمهٴ یوم یغنی الله کلّاً من سعته از افق سماء دنیا طالع و مشرق مشاهده شود.
output: Were mankind to be adorned with this raiment, they would behold the daystar of the utterance, On that day God will satisfy everyone out of His abundance, shining resplendent above the horizon of the world.

input: مقام این بیان را بشناسید چه که از علیا ثمرهٴ شجرهٴ قلم اعلی است.
output: Appreciate ye the value of this utterance; it is a noble fruit that the Tree of the Pen of Glory hath yielded.

input: نیکوست حال نفسی که شنید و فائز شد.
output: Happy is the man that giveth ear unto it and observeth its precepts.

input: براستی میگویم آنچه از سماء مشیّت الهی نازل آن سبب نظم عالم و علّت اتّحاد و اتّفاق اهل آن است.
output: Verily I say, whatever is sent down from the heaven of the Will of God is the means for the establishment of order in the world and the instrument for promoting unity and fellowship among its peoples.

input: کذلک نطق لسان المظلوم فی سجنه العظیم.
output: Thus hath the Tongue of this Wronged One spoken from His Most Great Prison.

input: ورق هفتم
output: seventh leaf

input: ای دانایان امم از بیگانگی چشم بردارید و به یگانگی ناظر باشید.
output: O ye men of wisdom among nations! Shut your eyes to estrangement, then fix your gaze upon unity.

input: و باسبابی که سبب راحت و آسایش عموم اهل عالم است تمسّک جوئید.
output: Cleave tenaciously unto that which will lead to the well-being and tranquility of all mankind.

input: این یک شبر عالم یک وطن و یک مقام است.
output: This span of earth is but one homeland and one habitation.

input: از افتخار که سبب اختلافست بگذرید و بآنچه علّت اتّفاق است توجّه نمائید.
output: It behooveth you to abandon vainglory which causeth alienation and to set your hearts on whatever will ensure harmony.

input: نزد اهل بها افتخار بعلم و عمل و اخلاق و دانش است نه بوطن و مقام.
output: In the estimation of the people of Bahá man's glory lieth in his knowledge, his upright conduct, his praiseworthy character, his wisdom, and not in his nationality or rank.

input: ای اهل زمین قدر این کلمهٴ آسمانی را بدانید.
output: O people of the earth! Appreciate the value of this heavenly word.

input: چه که بمنزلهٴ کشتی است از برای دریای دانائی و بمنزلهٴ آفتاب است از برای جهان بینائی.
output: Indeed it may be likened unto a ship for the ocean of knowledge and a shining luminary for the realm of perception.

input: ورق هشتم
output: eighth leaf

input: دار التّعلیم باید در ابتدا اولاد را بشرائط دین تعلیم دهند تا وعد و وعید مذکور در کتب الهی ایشان را از مناهی منع نماید و بطراز اوامر مزیّن دارد.
output: Schools must first train the children in the principles of religion, so that the Promise and the Threat recorded in the Books of God may prevent them from the things forbidden and adorn them with the mantle of the commandments; but this in such a

input: ولکن بقدری که بتعصّب و حمیّه جاهلیّه منجرّ و منتهی نگردد.
output: but this in such a measure that it may not injure the children by resulting in ignorant fanaticism and bigotry.

input: آنچه از حدودات در کتاب بر حسب ظاهر نازل نشده باید امنای بیت عدل مشورت نمایند آنچه را پسندیدند مجری دارند.
output: It is incumbent upon the Trustees of the House of Justice to take counsel together regarding those things which have not outwardly been revealed in the Book, and to enforce that which is agreeable to them.

input: انّه یلهمهم ما یشآء و هو المدبّر العلیم.
output: God will verily inspire them with whatsoever He willeth, and He, verily, is the Provider, the Omniscient.

input: از قبل فرمودیم تکلّم بدو لسان مقدّر شد و باید جهد شود تا بیکی منتهی گردد و همچنین خطوط عالم تا عمرهای مردم در تحصیل السن مختلفه ضایع نشود و باطل نگردد.
output: We have formerly ordained that people should converse in two languages, yet efforts must be made to reduce them to one, likewise the scripts of the world, that men's lives may not be dissipated and wasted in learning diverse languages.

input: و جمیع ارض مدینهٴ واحده و قطعهٴ واحده مشاهده شود.
output: Thus the whole earth would come to be regarded as one city and one land.

input: ورق نهم
output: ninth leaf

input: براستی میگویم هر امری از امور اعتدالش محبوب.
output: In all matters moderation is desirable.

input: چون تجاوز نماید سبب ضرّ گردد.
output: If a thing is carried to excess, it will prove a source of evil.

input: در تمدّن اهل غرب ملاحظه نمائید که سبب اضطراب و وحشت اهل عالم شده.
output: Consider the civilization of the West, how it hath agitated and alarmed the peoples of the world.

input: آلت جهنّمیّه بمیان آمده و در قتل وجود شقاوتی ظاهر شده که شبه آن را چشم عالم و آذان امم ندیده و نشنیده.
output: An infernal engine hath been devised, and hath proved so cruel a weapon of destruction that its like none hath ever witnessed or heard.

input: اصلاح این مفاسد قویّهٴ قاهره ممکن نه مگر باتّحاد احزاب عالم در امور و یا در مذهبی از مذاهب.
output: The purging of such deeply-rooted and overwhelming corruptions cannot be effected unless the peoples of the world unite in pursuit of one common aim and embrace one universal faith.

input: بشنوید ندای مظلوم را و بصلح اکبر تمسّک نمائید.
output: Incline your ears unto the Call of this Wronged One and adhere firmly to the Lesser Peace.

input: اسباب عجیبهٴ غریبه در ارض موجود ولکن از افئده و عقول مستور.
output: Strange and astonishing things exist in the earth but they are hidden from the minds and the understanding of men.

input: و آن اسبابیست که قادر است بر تبدیل هواء ارض کلّها و سمّیّت آن سبب هلاکت.
output: These things are capable of changing the whole atmosphere of the earth and their contamination would prove lethal.

input: امر عجیبی مشاهده گشت.
output: We have observed an amazing thing.

input: برق یا مثل آن مطیع قائد است و بامر او حرکت مینماید.
output: Lightning or a force similar to it is controlled by an operator and moveth at his command.

input: تعالی القادر الّذی اظهر ما اراد بامره المحکم المتین.
output: Immeasurably exalted is the Lord of Power Who hath laid bare that which He purposed through the potency of His weighty and invincible command.

input: اوامر منزله هر یک حصنی است محکم از برای وجود.
output: Each one of the ordinances We have revealed is a mighty stronghold for the preservation of the world of being.

input: انّ المظلوم ما اراد الّا حفظکم و ارتقائکم.
output: Verily, this Wronged One desireth naught but your security and elevation.

input: رجال بیت عدل را وصیّت مینمائیم و بصیانت و حفظ عباد و اماء و اطفال امر میفرمائیم.
output: We exhort the men of the House of Justice and command them to ensure the protection and safeguarding of men, women and children.

input: باید در جمیع احوال بمصالح عباد ناظر باشند.
output: It is incumbent upon them to have the utmost regard for the interests of the people at all times and under all conditions.

input: طوبی لامیر اخذ ید الاسیر و لغنیّ توجّه الی الفقیر و لعادل اخذ حقّ المظلوم من الظّالم و لامین عمل ما امر به من لدن آمر قدیم.
output: Blessed is the ruler who succoureth the captive, and the rich one who careth for the poor, and the just one who secureth from the wrong doer the rights of the downtrodden, and happy the trustee who observeth that which the Ordainer, the Ancient of Days hath prescribed unto him.

input: علیک بهائی و ثنائی.
output: Upon thee be My glory and My praise.

input: نصایح و مواعظ عالم را احاطه نموده مع‌ذلک سبب احزان شده نه فرح و سرور.
output: My counsels and admonitions have compassed the world.

input: چه که بعضی از مدّعیان محبّت طغیان نموده‌اند و وارد آورده‌اند آنچه را که از ملل قبل و علمای ایران وارد نشد.
output: Yet, instead of imparting joy and gladness they have caused grief, because some of those who claim to love Me have waxed haughty and have inflicted upon Me such tribulations as neither the followers of former religions nor the divines of Persia did ever inflict.

input: قلنا من قبل لیس بلیّتی سجنی و ما ورد علیّ من اعدائی.
output: We have said: My imprisonment doeth Me no harm, nor do the things that have befallen Me at the hands of My enemies.

input: بل عمل احبّائی الّذین ینسبون انفسهم الی نفسی و یرتکبون ما ینوح به قلبی و قلمی.
output: That which harmeth Me is the conduct of my loved ones who, though they bear My name, yet commit that which maketh My heart and My pen to lament.

input: مکرّر امثال این بیانات نازل ولکن غافلین را نفعی نبخشید چه که اسیر نفس و هوی مشاهده میشوند.
output: Such utterances as these have again and again been revealed, yet the heedless have failed to profit thereby, since they are captive to their own evil passions and corrupt desires.

input: از حقّ بطلب کل را تایید فرماید بر انابه و رجوع.
output: Beseech thou the One true God that He may enable everyone to repent and return unto Him.

input: تا نفس بمشتهیاتش باقی جرم و خطا موجود.
output: So long as one's nature yieldeth unto evil passions, crime and transgression will prevail.

input: امید آنکه ید بخشش الهی و رحمت رحمانی کل را اخذ نماید و بطراز عفو و عطا مزیّن دارد.
output: We cherish the hope that the hand of divine power and the outpouring of heavenly blessings may sustain all men, may attire them with the vesture of forgiveness and bounty and guard them against that which would harm His Cause among His servants.

input: و همچنین حفظ فرماید از آنچه سبب تضییع امر اوست مابین عبادش.
output: and guard them against that which would harm His Cause among His servants.

input: انّه هو المقتدر القدیر و هو الغفور الرّحیم.
output: He is, in truth, the Potent, the All-Powerful, and He is the Ever-Forgiving, the Merciful.

input: ورق دهم
output: tenth leaf

input: یا اهل ارض انزوا و ریاضات شاقّه بعزّ قبول فائز نه.
output: O people of the earth! Living in seclusion or practicing asceticism is not acceptable in the presence of God.

input: صاحبان بصر و خرد ناظرند باسبابی که سبب روح و ریحان است.
output: It behooveth them that are endued with insight and understanding to observe that which will cause joy and radiance.

input: امثال این امور از صلب ظنون و بطن اوهام ظاهر و متولّد لائق اصحاب دانش نبوده و نیست.
output: Such practices as are sprung from the loins of idle fancy or are begotten of the womb of superstition ill beseem men of knowledge.

input: بعضی از عباد از قبل و بعد در مغاره‌های جبال ساکن و بعضی در لیالی بقبور متوجّه.
output: In former times and more recently some people have been taking up their abodes in the caves of the mountains while others have repaired to graveyards at night.

input: بگو بشنوید نصح مظلوم را.
output: Say, give ear unto the counsels of this Wronged One.

input: از ما عندکم بگذرید و بآنچه ناصح امین میفرماید تمسّک جوئید.
output: Abandon the things current amongst you and adopt that which the faithful Counselor biddeth you.

input: لا تحرموا انفسکم عمّا خلق لکم.
output: Deprive not yourselves of the bounties which have been created for your sake.

input: انفاق عندالله محبوب و مقبول و از سیّد اعمال مذکور.
output: Charity is pleasing and praiseworthy in the sight of God and is regarded as a prince among goodly deeds.

input: انظروا ثمّ اذکروا ما انزله الرّحمن فی الفرقان و یوثرون علی انفسهم ولو کان بهم خصاصه.
output: Consider ye and call to mind that which the All-Merciful hath revealed in the Qur'án: They prefer them before themselves, though poverty be their own lot.

input: و من یوق شحّ نفسه فاولئک هم الفائزون فی‌الحقیقه.
output: And with such as are preserved from their own covetousness shall it be well.

input: این کلمهٴ مبارکه در این مقام آفتاب کلمات است.
output: Viewed in this light, the blessed utterance above is, in truth, the daystar of utterances.

input: طوبی لمن اختار اخاه علی نفسه.
output: Blessed is he who preferreth his brother before himself.

input: انّه من اهل البهآء فی السّفینه الحمرآء من لدی الله العلیم الحکیم.
output: Verily, such a man is reckoned, by virtue of the Will of God, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, with the people of Bahá who dwell in the Crimson Ark.

input: ورق یازدهم
output: eleventh leaf

input: مظاهر اسماء و صفات را از بعد امر مینمائیم کل بآنچه در این ظهور اعظم ظاهر شد تمسّک نمایند و سبب اختلاف نشوند و الی الآخر الّذی لا آخر له بآفاق این کلمات مشرقات که در این ورقه نازل شده ناظر باشند.
output: We enjoin upon them that are the emblems of His names and attributes to firmly adhere henceforth unto that which hath been set forth in this Most Great Revelation, not to allow themselves to become the cause of strife, and, until the end that knoweth no end, to keep their eyes directed towards the dayspring of these resplendent words which have been recorded in this Tablet.

input: اختلاف سبب خون‌ریزیست و علّت انقلاب عباد است.
output: Strife leads to bloodshed and provokes commotion amongst people.

input: بشنوید ندای مظلوم را و از آن تجاوز ننمائید.
output: Hearken ye unto the Voice of this Wronged One and deviate not therefrom.

input: اگر نفسی در آنچه از قلم اعلی در این ظهور نازل شده تفکّر نماید یقین مینماید این مظلوم آنچه ذکر نموده مقصودش اثبات مقام و شانی از برای خود نبوده.
output: Were anyone to ponder in his heart that which hath, in this Revelation, streamed forth from the Pen of Glory, he would be assured that whatever this Wronged One hath affirmed He hath had no intention of establishing any position or distinction for Himself.

input: بل اراده آنکه بکلمات عالیات نفوس را بافق اعلی جذب نمائیم و مستعدّ کنیم از برای اصغای آنچه که سبب تنزیه و تطهیر اهل عالم است از نزاع و جدالی که بواسطهٴ اختلاف مذاهب ظاهر میشود.
output: The purpose hath rather been to attract the souls, through the sublimity of His words, unto the summit of transcendent glory and to endow them with the capacity of perceiving that which will purge and purify the peoples of the world from the strife and dissension which religious differences provoke.

input: یشهد بذلک قلبی و قلمی و ظاهری و باطنی.
output: Unto this bear witness My heart, My Pen, My inner and My outer Being.

input: انشآء‌الله کل بخزانه‌های مکنونه در خود توجّه نمایند.
output: God grant that all men may turn unto the treasuries latent within their own beings.

input: قوّه متفکّره مخزن صنایع و علوم و فنون است.
output: The source of crafts, sciences and arts is the power of reflection.

input: جهد نمائید تا از این معدن حقیقی لآلی حکمت و بیان ظاهر شود و سبب آسایش و اتّحاد احزاب مختلفه عالم گردد.
output: Make ye every effort that out of this ideal mine there may gleam forth such pearls of wisdom and utterance as will promote the well-being and harmony of all the kindreds of the earth.

input: این مظلوم در جمیع احوال از شدّت و رخا و عزّت و عذاب کل را بمحبّت و وداد و شفقت و اتّحاد امر نمود.
output: Under all conditions, whether in adversity or at ease, whether honored or afflicted, this Wronged One hath directed all men to show forth love, affection, compassion and harmony.

input: هر یوم که فی‌‌الجمله علوّ و سموّی ظاهر شد نفوس مستوره از خلف حجاب بیرون میآمدند و بمفتریاتی تکلّم مینمودند که احدّ از سیف بود.
output: And yet whenever there was any slight evidence of progress and advancement, those concealed behind the veils would sally forth and utter calumnies more wounding than the sword.

input: بکلمات مردوده مجعوله متمسّکند و از بحر آیات الهی ممنوع و محروم.
output: They cling unto misleading and reprehensible words and suffer themselves to be deprived of the ocean of verses revealed by God.

input: و اگر این حجبات حائل نمیشد ایران در دو سنه او ازید ببیان مسخّر میگشت مقام دولت و ملّت هر دو مرتفع میشد چه که مقصود بکمال ظهور من غیر ستر و خفا ظاهر میشد.
output: If these obstructing veils had not intervened Persia would, in some two years, have been subdued through the power of utterance, the position of both the government and the people would have been raised and the Supreme Goal, unveiled and unconcealed, would have appeared in the plenitude of glory.

input: باری تارهً بالتّصریح و اخری بالتّلویح آنچه باید گفته شود گفتیم.
output: In short, sometimes in explicit language, at other times by allusion, We said whatever had to be said.

input: و بعد از اصلاح ایران نفحات کلمه در سائر ممالک متضوّع میگشت چه که آنچه از قلم اعلی جاری شده سبب علوّ و سموّ و تربیت جمیع اهل عالم بوده و هست.
output: Thus, once Persia had been rehabilitated, the sweet savors of the Word of God would have wafted over all countries, inasmuch as that which hath streamed forth from the Most Exalted Pen is conducive to the glory, the advancement and education of all the peoples and kindreds of the earth.

input: و از برای جمیع امراض دریاق اعظم است.
output: Indeed it is the sovereign remedy for every disease, could they but comprehend and perceive it.

input: لو هم یفقهون و یشعرون
output: could they but comprehend and perceive it.

input: این ایّام حضرات افنان و امین علیهم بهائی و عنایتی بحضور و لقا فائز و همچنین نبیل بن نبیل و ابن سمندر علیهم بهآء الله و عنایته حاضر و از کاس وصال مرزوق.
output: Recently the Afnáns and Amín—upon them be My glory and loving-kindness—attained Our presence and beheld Our countenance; likewise Nabíl, the son of Nabíl and the son of Samandar—upon them rest the glory of God and His loving-kindness—are present and have drunk the cup of reunion.

input: نسال الله ان یقدّر لهم خیر الآخره و الاولی و ینزل علیهم من سمآء فضله و سحاب رحمته برکه من عنده و رحمه من لدنه.
output: We entreat God that He may graciously ordain for them the good of this world and of the next and that the outpouring of His blessings and grace may descend upon them from the heaven of His generosity and the clouds of His tender compassion.

input: انّه هو ارحم الرّاحمین و هو الفضّال الکریم.
output: Verily of those who show mercy He is the Most Merciful, and He is the Gracious, the Beneficent.

input: نامهٴ دیگر شما که باسم جود ارسال نمودی بساحت اقدس فائز.
output: Thine other letter which thou hadst forwarded through him who beareth the title of Júd hath reached Our holy court.

input: مزیّن بود بنور توحید و تقدیس و مشتعل بود بنار محبّت و وداد.
output: It was adorned with the light of divine unity and of detachment and was ablaze with the fire of love and affection.

input: از حقّ بطلب ابصار را قوّت بخشد و بنور تازه منوّر دارد شاید فائز شود بآنچه که شبه و مثل نداشته.
output: Pray thou unto God that He may grant keenness to the eyes and illumine them with a new light, perchance they may perceive that which hath no parallel nor peer.

input: امروز آیات امّ الکتاب بمثابهٴ آفتاب مشرق و لائح.
output: In this day the verses of the Mother Book are resplendent and unmistakable even as the sun.

input: بکلمات قبل و بعد مشتبه نشده و نمیشود.
output: They can in no wise be mistaken for any of the past or more recent utterances.

input: انّ المظلوم لا یحبّ ان یستدلّ فی امره بما ظهر من غیره.
output: Truly this Wronged One desireth not to demonstrate His Own Cause with proofs produced by others.

input: اوست محیط و ماسوایش محاط.
output: He is the One Who embraceth all things, while all else besides Him is circumscribed.

input: قل یا قوم اقرووا ما عندکم و نقرا ما عندنا.
output: Say, O people, peruse that which is current amongst you and We will peruse what pertaineth unto Us.

input: لعمر الله لا یذکر عند ذکره اذکار العالم و ما عند الامم.
output: I swear by God! Neither the praise of the peoples of the world, nor the things that the kindreds of the earth possess are worthy of mention before the remembrance of His Name.

input: یشهد بذلک من ینطق فی کلّ شان انّه هو الله مالک یوم الدّین و ربّ العرش العظیم.
output: Unto this beareth witness He Who under all conditions proclaimeth, Verily He is God, the sovereign Ruler of the Day of Reckoning and the Lord of the mighty Throne.

input: معلوم نیست معرضین بیان بچه حجّت و برهان از سیّد امکان اعراض نموده‌اند.
output: One wondereth by what proof or reason the disbelievers among the people of the Bayán have turned away from the Lord of being.

input: مقام این امر فوق مقام ما ظهر و یظهر است.
output: In truth the station of this Revelation transcendeth the station of whatever hath been manifested in the past or will be made manifest in the future.

input: اگر نعوذ بالله الیوم نقطهٴ بیان حاضر باشد و در تصدیق توقّف نماید داخل کلمهٴ مبارکه که از مطلع بیان آن حضرت نازل شده میشوند.
output: Were the Point of the Bayán present in this day and should He, God forbid, hesitate to acknowledge this Cause, then the very blessed words which have streamed forth from the wellspring of His Own Bayán would apply to Him.

input: قال و قوله الحقّ حقّ لمن یظهره الله ان یردّ من لم یکن اعلی منه فوق الارض.
output: He saith, and His word is the truth, Lawful is it for Him Whom God will make manifest to reject him who is the greatest on earth.

input: بگو ای بیدانشها الیوم آن حضرت به انّنی انا اوّل العابدین ناطق.
output: Say, O ye that are bereft of understanding! Today that Most Exalted Being is proclaiming: Verily, verily, I am the first to adore Him.

input: بضاعت عرفان خلق مزجاه است و قوّهٴ ادراکشان ضعیف.
output: How shallow is the fund of men's knowledge and how feeble their power of perception.

input: شهد القلم الاعلی بفقرهم و غنآء الله ربّ العالمین.
output: Our Pen of Glory beareth witness to their abject poverty and to the wealth of God, the Lord of all worlds.

input: سبحان الّذی خلق الخلق و هو الحقّ علّام الغیوب.
output: Lauded and glorified is He Who hath called the creation into being. He is the sovereign Truth, the Knower of things unseen.

input: قد نزّل امّ الکتاب و الوهّاب فی مقام محمود.
output: The Mother Book is revealed and the Lord of Bounty is established upon the most blessed seat of glory.

input: قد طلع الفجر و القوم لا یفقهون.
output: The Dawn hath broken, yet the people understand not.

input: قد اتت الآیات و منزلها فی حزن مشهود.
output: The signs have been ushered in, while He Who hath revealed them is overwhelmed with manifest sorrow.

input: قد ورد علیّ ما ناح به الوجود.
output: Indeed I have endured that which hath caused the world of existence to lament.

input: قل یا یحیی فات بآیه ان کنت ذی علم رشید هذا ما نطق به مبشّری من قبل و فی هذا الحین یقول انّنی انا اوّل العابدین.
output: Say: O Yahyá Azal, produce a single verse, if thou dost possess divinely-inspired knowledge. These words were formerly spoken by My Herald Who at this hour proclaimeth: Verily, verily, I am the first to adore Him.

input: انصف یا اخی.
output: Be fair, O My brother.

input: هل کنت ذا بیان عند امواج بحر بیانی.
output: Art thou able to express thyself when brought face to face with the billowing ocean of Mine utterance?

input: و هل کنت ذا ندآء لدی صریر قلمی.
output: Canst thou unloose thy tongue when confronted with the shrill voice of My Pen?

input: و هل کنت ذا قدره عند ظهورات قدرتی.
output: Hast thou any power before the revelations of Mine omnipotence?

input: انصف بالله ثمّ اذکر اذ کنت قائماً لدی المظلوم و نلقی علیک آیات الله المهیمن القیّوم.
output: Judge thou fairly, I adjure thee by God, and call to mind when thou didst stand in the presence of this Wronged One and We dictated to thee the verses of God, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting.

input: ایّاک ان یمنعک مطلع الکذب عن هذا الصّدق المبین.
output: Beware lest the source of falsehood withhold thee from the manifest Truth.

input: بگو ای عباد غافل!
output: Say: O ye heedless ones!

input: بقطره‌ئی از بحر آیات الهی محروم گشتید و بذرّه‌ئی از تجلّیات انوار آفتاب حقیقت ممنوع.
output: By reason of a droplet ye have deprived yourselves of the ocean of heavenly verses and for the sake of an insignificant atom ye have shut yourselves out from the splendors of the Daystar of Truth.

input: لو لا البهآء من یقدر ان یتکلّم امام الوجوه.
output: Who else but Bahá hath the power to speak forth before the face of mankind?

input: انصفوا و لا تکونوا من الظّالمین.
output: Judge ye fairly and be not of the unjust.

input: به ماجت البحار و ظهرت الاسرار و نطقت الاشجار الملک و الملکوت لله منزل الآیات و مظهر البیّنات.
output: Through Him the oceans have surged, the mysteries have been divulged and the trees have lifted up their voices exclaiming: The kingdoms of earth and heaven are God's, the Revealer of signs, the Fountainhead of clear tokens.

input: بیان فارسی حضرت مبشّر را ملاحظه نمائید و ببصر عدل در آن مشاهده کنید.
output: Peruse ye the Persian Bayán revealed by Him Who heralded this Revelation and look at it with the eye of fairness.

input: انّه یهدیکم الی صراط.
output: Verily He will guide you aright to His Path.

input: ینطق فی هذا الحین بما نطق لسانه من قبل اذ کان مستویاً علی عرش اسمه العظیم.
output: At this moment He proclaimeth that which His tongue had formerly uttered when He was seated upon the throne of His most exalted Name.

input: ذکر اولیای آن اطراف را نموده‌اند.
output: Thou hast made mention of the loved ones in those regions.

input: لله الحمد هر یک بذکر حقّ جلّ جلاله فائز گشت و اسامی کل در ملکوت بیان از لسان عظمت جاری و ظاهر.
output: Praised be God, each one of them attained the honor of being remembered by the True One—exalted is His glory—and the names of them, one and all, flowed from the Tongue of Grandeur in the kingdom of utterance.

input: طوبی لهم و نعیماً لهم بما شربوا رحیق الوحی و الالهام من ایادی عطآء ربّهم المشفق الکریم.
output: Great indeed is their blessedness and happiness, inasmuch as they have drunk the choice wine of revelation and inspiration from the hand of their Lord, the Compassionate, the Merciful.

input: نسال الله ان یوفّقهم علی الاستقامه الکبری و یمدّهم بجنود الحکمه و البیان.
output: We beseech God to strengthen them to manifest inflexible constancy and to summon to their aid the hosts of wisdom and utterance.

input: کبّر من قبلی علیهم و بشّرهم بما اشرق و لاح نیّر الذّکر من افق سمآء عطآء ربّهم الغفور الرّحیم.
output: Convey my greetings to them and give them the joyful tidings that the Daystar of remembrance hath dawned and shed its radiance from above the horizon of the bountiful favors of their Lord, the Ever-Forgiving, the All-Merciful.

input: ذکر جناب حاء قبل سین ل‌ط را نمودند.
output: Thou hast mentioned Husayn.

input: انّا زیّنّا هیکله بطراز العفو و راسه باکلیل الغفران.
output: We have attired his temple with the robe of forgiveness and adorned his head with the crown of pardon.

input: له ان یباهی بین الانام بهذا الفضل المشرق اللّائح المبین.
output: It beseemeth him to pride himself among all men upon this resplendent, this radiant and manifest bounty.

input: بگو محزون مباش.
output: Say: Be not despondent.

input: بعد از نزول این آیهٴ مبارکه مثل آن است که در این حین از بطن امّ متولّد گشته.
output: After the revelation of this blessed verse it is as though thou hast been born anew from thy mother's womb. Say:

input: قل لیس لک ذنب و لا خطآء.
output: Say: Thou art free from sin and error.

input: قد طهّرک الله من کوثر بیانه فی سجنه العظیم.
output: Truly God hath purged thee with the living waters of His utterance in His Most Great Prison.

input: نساله تبارک و تعالی ان یویّدک علی ذکره و ثنائه و یمدّک بجنود الغیب.
output: We entreat Him—blessed and exalted is He—to graciously confirm thee in extolling Him and in magnifying His glory and to strengthen thee through the power of His invisible hosts.

input: انّه هو القویّ القدیر.
output: Verily, He is the Almighty, the Omnipotent.

input: ذکر اهل طار را نمودید.
output: Thou hast made mention of the people of Tár.

input: انّا اقبلنا الی عباد الله هناک و نوصیهم فی اوّل البیان بما انزله نقطه البیان لهذا الظّهور الّذی به ارتعدت فرائص الاسمآء و سقطت اصنام الاوهام و نطق لسان العظمه من افقه الاعلی تالله قد ظهر الکنز المکنون و السّرّ المخزون الّذی به ابتسم ثغر ما کان و ما یکون .قال و قوله الحقّ و قد کتبت جوهره فی ذکره و هو انّه لا یستشار باشارتی و لا بما ذکر فی البیان.
output: We have set Our face toward the servants of God therein and advise them first to consider that which the Point of the Bayán hath revealed concerning this Revelation whereby all names and titles have been shaken, the idols of vain imaginings have crumbled and the Tongue of Grandeur hath, from the realm of glory, proclaimed: By the righteousness of God! The Hidden Treasure, the Impenetrable Mystery, hath been uncovered to men's eyes, causing all things, whether of the past or of the future, to rejoice.

input: و نوصیهم بالعدل و الانصاف و الامانه و الدّیانه و ما ترتفع به کلمه الله و مقاماتهم بین العباد.
output: Moreover We counsel them to observe justice, equity, honesty, piety and that whereby both the Word of God and their own station will be exalted amongst men.

input: و انا النّاصح بالحقّ.
output: Verily I am the One Who exhorteth with justice.

input: یشهد بذلک من جری من قلمه فرات الرّحمه و من بیانه کوثر الحیوان لاهل الامکان.
output: Unto this beareth witness He from Whose Pen rivers of mercy have flowed and from Whose utterance fountains of living waters have streamed forth unto all created things.

input: تعالی هذا الفضل الاعظم و تباهی هذا العطآء المبین.
output: Immeasurably exalted is this boundless grace; immensely blessed is this resplendent favor.

input: یا اهل طار!
output: O people of Tár!

input: اسمعوا ندآء المختار انّه یذکرکم بما یقرّبکم الی الله ربّ العالمین.
output: Give ear unto the Call of Him Who doeth whatsoever He willeth. In truth He remindeth you of that which will draw you nigh unto God, the Lord of the worlds.

input: انّه اقبل الیکم من سجن عکّآء و انزل لکم ما یبقی به اذکارکم و اسمائکم فی کتاب لا یاخذه المحو و لا تبدّله شبهات المعرضین.
output: He hath turned His face towards you from the Prison of Akká and hath revealed for your sakes what will immortalize your memory and your names in the Book which cannot be effaced and remaineth unaffected by the doubts of the froward.

input: ضعوا ما عند القوم و خذوا ما امرتم به من لدن آمر قدیم.
output: Cast away the things current amongst men and take fast hold on that whereunto ye are bidden by virtue of the Will of the Ordainer, the Ancient of Days.

input: هذا یوم فیه تنادی سدره المنتهی و تقول یا قوم انظروا اثماری و اوراقی ثمّ استمعوا حفیفی.
output: This is the Day wherein the divine Lote-Tree calleth aloud, saying: O people! Behold ye My fruits and My leaves, incline then your ears unto My rustling.

input: ایّاکم ان تمنعکم شبهات القوم عن نور الیقین.
output: Beware lest the doubts of men debar you from the light of certitude.

input: و بحر البیان ینادی و یقول یا اهل الارض انظروا الی امواجی و ما ظهر منّی من لآلئ الحکمه و البیان.
output: The Ocean of utterance exclaimeth and saith: O ye dwellers on the earth! Behold My billowing waters and the pearls of wisdom and utterance which I have poured forth.

input: اتّقوا الله و لا تکونوا من الغافلین.
output: Fear ye God and be not of the heedless.

input: امروز جشن عظیم در ملا اعلی برپا چه که آنچه در کتب الهی وعده داده شده ظاهر گشته.
output: In this Day a great festival is taking place in the Realm above; for whatsoever was promised in the sacred Scriptures hath been fulfilled.

input: یوم فرح اکبر است.
output: This is the Day of great rejoicing.

input: باید کل بکمال فرح و نشاط و سرور و انبساط قصد بساط قرب نمایند و خود را از نار بعد نجات دهند.
output: It behooveth everyone to hasten towards the court of His nearness with exceeding joy, gladness, exultation and delight and to deliver himself from the fire of remoteness.

input: خذوا بقوّه اسمی الاعظم کووس العرفان ثمّ اشربوا منها رغماً لاهل الامکان الّذین نقضوا عهد الله و میثاقه و انکروا حجّته و برهانه و جادلوا بآیاته الّتی احاطت علی من فی السّموات و الارضین.
output: Through the strengthening power of My Name seize ye the chalice of knowledge, drink then your fill in defiance of the people of the world who have broken the Covenant of God and His Testament, rejected His proofs and clear tokens, and caviled at His signs which have pervaded all that are in heaven and on earth.

input: معرضین بیان بمثابهٴ حزب شیعه مشاهده میشوند و بر قدم آن حزب مشی مینمایند.
output: The disbelievers among the people of the Bayán are like the followers of the Shí'ih sect and walk in their footsteps.

input: ذروهم فی اوهامهم و ظنونهم.
output: Leave them to their idle fancies and vain imaginings.

input: انّهم من الاخسرین فی کتاب الله العلیم الحکیم.
output: They are in truth accounted with the lost in the Book of God, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise.

input: حال علمای شیعه طرّاً بر منابر بسب و لعن حقّ مشغول.
output: The Shí'ih divines, one and all, are now engaged in reviling and denouncing the True One from their pulpits. Gracious God!

input: دولت‌آبادی هم متابعت آن قوم را نمود.
output: Dawlat-Ábádí too hath followed suit.

input: و بر منبر ارتقا جست و تکلّم نمود بآنچه که لوح صیحه زد و قلم نوحه کرد.
output: He ascended the pulpit and gave voice to that which hath caused the Tablet to cry out in anguish and the Pen to wail.

input: در عمل او و عمل اشرف علیه بهائی و عنایتی تفکّر نمائید و همچنین در اولیائی که باین اسم قصد مقرّ فدا نمودند و جان را در سبیل مقصود عالمیان انفاق کردند.
output: Meditate upon his conduct and the conduct of Ashraf—upon him be My glory and My tender mercy—and likewise consider those loved ones who hastened to the place of martyrdom in My Name, and offered up their lives in the path of Him Who is the Desire of the world.

input: امر ظاهر و بمثابهٴ آفتاب لائح ولکن قوم خود حجاب خود شده‌اند.
output: The Cause is manifest, it shineth resplendent as the sun, but the people have become veils unto themselves.

input: از حقّ میطلبیم ایشان را مویّد فرماید بر رجوع.
output: We entreat God that He may graciously assist them to return unto Him.

input: انّه هو التّوّاب الرّحیم.
output: He is, in truth, the Forgiving, the Merciful.

input: انّا نکبّر من هذا المقام علی وجوهکم و نسال الله تبارک و تعالی ان یسقیکم رحیق الاستقامه من ایادی عطائه.
output: We send you greetings from this Spot and beseech God—blessed and exalted is He—to give you to drink the choice wine of constancy from the hand of His favor.

input: انّه هو الفیّاض العزیز الحمید.
output: Verily, He is the Lord of Bounty, the Gracious, the All-Praised.

input: بگذارید نابالغهای عالم را که بهوی متحرّکند و بمطالع اوهام متشبّث.
output: Leave ye unto themselves the immature ones of the world—they that are moved by selfish desire and cling to the exponents of idle fancy.

input: انّه مویّدکم و معینکم.
output: Verily He is your Helper and Succourer.

input: انّه هو المقتدر علی ما یشآء.
output: He is, in truth, potent to do whatsoever He willeth.

input: لا اله الّا هو الفرد الواحد العزیز العظیم.
output: No God is there but Him, the One, the Peerless, the Mighty, the Most Great.

input: البهآء من لدنّا علی الّذین اقبلوا الی مشرق الظّهور و اقرّوا و اعترفوا بما نطق به لسان البیان فی ملکوت العرفان فی هذا الیوم المبارک العزیز البدیع.
output: May glory from Our presence rest upon those who have set their faces toward the Dayspring of His Revelation and have acknowledged and recognized that which the Tongue of utterance hath spoken in the kingdom of knowledge in this blessed, this glorious and incomparable Day.

input: کتاب انزله الرّحمن من ملکوت البیان.
output: This is an Epistle which the All-Merciful hath sent down from the Kingdom of Utterance.

input: و انّه لروح الحیوان لاهل الامکان.
output: It is truly a breath of life unto those who dwell in the realm of creation.

input: تعالی الله ربّ العالمین.
output: Glorified be the Lord of all worlds.

input: یذکر فیه من یذکر الله ربّه انّه لهو النّبیل فی لوح عظیم.
output: In this Epistle mention is made of him who magnifieth the Name of God, his Lord, and who is named Nabíl in a weighty Tablet.

input: یا محمّد.
output: O Muhammad.

input: اسمع النّدآء من شطر الکبریآء من السّدره المرتفعه علی ارض الزّعفران انّه لا اله الّا انا العلیم الحکیم.
output: Hearken unto the Voice proceeding out of the Realm of Glory, calling aloud from the celestial Tree which hath risen above the land of Za'farán: Verily, no God is there but Me, the Omniscient, the Wise.

input: کن هبوب الرّحمن لاشجار الامکان و مربّیها باسم ربّک العادل الخبیر.
output: Be thou as the breezes of the All-Merciful for the trees of the realm of existence and foster their growth through the potency of the Name of thy Lord, the Just, the All-Informed.

input: انّا اردنا ان نذکر لک ما یتذکّر به النّاس لیدعنّ ما عندهم و یتوجّهنّ الی الله مولی المخلصین.
output: We desire to acquaint thee with that which will serve as a reminder unto the people, that they may put away the things current amongst them and set their faces towards God, the Lord of the sincere.

input: انّا ننصح العباد فی هذه الایّام الّتی فیها تغبّر وجه العدل و انارت وجنه الجهل و هتک ستر العقل و غاض الرّاحه و الوفآء و فاض المحنه و البلآء و فیها نقضت العهود و نکثت العقود لا یدری نفس ما یبصره و یعمیه و ما یضلّه و یهدیه.
output: We exhort mankind in these days when the countenance of Justice is soiled with dust, when the flames of unbelief are burning high and the robe of wisdom rent asunder, when tranquility and faithfulness have ebbed away and trials and tribulations have waxed severe, when covenants are broken and ties are severed, when no man knoweth how to discern light and darkness or to distinguish guidance from error.

input: دعوا الرّذائل و خذوا الفضائل.
output: Forsake all evil, hold fast that which is good.

input: کونوا قدوهً حسنه بین النّاس و صحیفه یتذکّر بها الاناس.
output: Strive to be shining examples unto all mankind, and true reminders of the virtues of God amidst men.

input: من قام لخدمه الامر له ان یصدع بالحکمه و یسعی فی ازاله الجهل عن بین البریّه.
output: He that riseth to serve My Cause should manifest My wisdom, and bend every effort to banish ignorance from the earth.

input: قل ان اتّحدوا فی کلمتکم و اتّفقوا فی رایکم.
output: Be united in counsel, be one in thought.

input: و اجعلوا اشراقکم افضل من عشیّکم و غدکم احسن من امسکم.
output: Let each morn be better than its eve and each morrow richer than its yesterday.

input: فضل الانسان فی الخدمه و الکمال لا فی الزّینه و الثّروه و المال.
output: Man's merit lieth in service and virtue and not in the pageantry of wealth and riches.

input: اجعلوا اقوالکم مقدّسه عن الزّیغ و الهوی و اعمالکم منزّهه عن الرّیب و الرّیآء.
output: Take heed that your words be purged from idle fancies and worldly desires and your deeds be cleansed from craftiness and suspicion.

input: قل لا تصرفوا نقود اعمارکم النّفیسه فی المشتهیات النّفسیّه و لا تقتصروا الامور علی منافعکم الشّخصیّه.
output: Dissipate not the wealth of your precious lives in the pursuit of evil and corrupt affection, nor let your endeavors be spent in promoting your personal interest.

input: انفقوا اذا وجدتم و اصبروا اذا فقدتم.
output: Be generous in your days of plenty, and be patient in the hour of loss.

input: انّ بعد کلّ شدّه رخآء و مع کلّ کدر صفآء.
output: Adversity is followed by success and rejoicings follow woe.

input: اجتنبوا التّکاهل و التّکاسل و تمسّکوا بما ینتفع به العالم من الصّغیر و الکبیر و الشّیوخ و الارامل.
output: Guard against idleness and sloth, and cling unto that which profiteth mankind, whether young or old, whether high or low.

input: قل ایّاکم ان تزرعوا زوان الخصومه بین البریّه و شوک الشّکوک فی القلوب الصّافیه المنیره.
output: Beware lest ye sow tares of dissension among men or plant thorns of doubt in pure and radiant hearts.

input: قل یا احبّآء الله.
output: O ye beloved of the Lord.

input: لا تعملوا ما یتکدّر به صافی سلسبیل المحبّه و ینقطع به عرف المودّه.
output: Commit not that which defileth the limpid stream of love or destroyeth the sweet fragrance of friendship.

input: قد خلقتم للوداد لا للضّغینه و العناد.
output: Ye were created to show love one to another and not perversity and rancor.

input: لیس الفخر لحبّکم انفسکم بل لحبّ ابنآء جنسکم.
output: Take pride not in love for yourselves but in love for your fellow-creatures.

input: و لیس الفضل لمن یحبّ الوطن بل لمن یحبّ العالم.
output: Glory not in love for your country, but in love for all mankind.

input: کونوا فی الطّرف عفیفاً و فی الید امیناً و فی اللّسان صادقاً و فی القلب متذکّراً.
output: Let your eye be chaste, your hand faithful, your tongue truthful and your heart enlightened.

input: لا تسقطوا منزله العلمآء فی البهآء و لا تصغّروا قدر من یعدل بینکم من الامرآء.
output: Abase not the station of the learned in Bahá and belittle not the rank of such rulers as administer justice amidst you.

input: اجعلوا جندکم العدل و سلاحکم العقل و شیمکم العفو و الفضل و ما تفرح به افئده المقرّبین.
output: Set your reliance on the army of justice, put on the armor of wisdom, let your adorning be forgiveness and mercy and that which cheereth the hearts of the well-favored of God.

input: قد احزننی ما ذکرت من الاحزان.
output: Thy grievances have plunged Me into sorrow.

input: لا تنظر الی الخلق و اعمالهم بل الی الحقّ و سلطانه.
output: Regard not the children of the world and all their doings but fix thy gaze upon God and His never-ending dominion.

input: انّه یذکرک بما کان مبدا فرح العالمین.
output: Verily, He calleth to thy remembrance that which is the source of delight for all mankind.

input: اشرب کوثر السّرور من قدح بیان مطلع الظّهور الّذی یذکرک فی هذا الحصن المتین.
output: Drink thou the life-giving water of blissful joy from the chalice of utterance proffered by the Fountainhead of divine Revelation—He Who hath made mention of thee in this mighty stronghold.

input: و افرغ جهدک فی احقاق الحقّ بالحکمه و البیان و ازهاق الباطل عن بین الامکان.
output: Endeavor to the utmost of thy powers to establish the word of truth with eloquence and wisdom and to dispel falsehood from the face of the earth.

input: کذلک یامرک مشرق العرفان من هذا الافق المنیر.
output: Thus directeth thee the Dayspring of divine knowledge from this luminous horizon.

input: یا ایّها النّاطق باسمی.
output: O thou who speakest in My name.

input: انظر النّاس و ما عملوا فی ایّامی.
output: Consider the people and the things they have wrought in My days.

input: انّا نزّلنا لاحد من الامرآء ما عجز عنه من علی الارض و سالناه ان یجمعنا مع علمآء العصر لیظهر له حجّه الله و برهانه و عظمته و سلطانه و ما اردنا بذلک الّا الخیر المحض.
output: We revealed unto one of the rulers that which overpowereth all the dwellers of the earth, and requested him to bring Us face to face with the learned men of this age, that We might set forth for him the testimony of God, His proofs, His glory and His majesty.

input: انّه ارتکب ما ناح به سکّان مدائن العدل و الانصاف.
output: and naught did We intend thereby but the highest good. However, he committed that which hath caused the inmates of the cities of justice and equity to lament.

input: و بذلک قضی بینی و بینه.
output: Thus hath judgment been given between Me and him.

input: انّ ربّک لهو الحاکم الخبیر.
output: Verily thy Lord is the Ordainer, the All-Informed.

input: و مع ما تراه کیف یقدر ان یطیر الطّیر الالهیّ فی هوآء المعانی بعدما انکسرت قوادمه باحجار الظّنون و البغضآء و حبس فی سجن بنی من الصّخره الملسآء.
output: In such circumstances as thou seest, how can the Celestial Bird soar into the atmosphere of divine mysteries when its wings have been battered with the stones of idle fancy and bitter hatred, and it is cast into a prison built of unyielding stone.

input: انّ القوم فی ظلم عظیم.
output: The people have perpetrated a grievous injustice.

input: و امّا ما ذکرت فی بدء الخلق هذا مقام یختلف باختلاف الافئده و الانظار.
output: As regards thine assertions about the beginning of creation, this is a matter on which conceptions vary by reason of the divergences in men's thoughts and opinions.

input: لو تقول انّه کان و یکون هذا حقّ و لو تقول کما ذکر فی الکتب المقدّسه انّه لا ریب فیه نزّل من لدی الله ربّ العالمین.
output: Wert thou to assert that it hath ever existed and shall continue to exist, it would be true. or wert thou to affirm the same concept as is mentioned in the sacred Scriptures, no doubt would there be about it, for it hath been revealed by God, the Lord of the worlds.

input: انّه کان کنزاً مخفیّاً.
output: Indeed He was a hidden treasure.

input: و هذا مقام لا یعبّر بعباره و لا یشار باشاره.
output: This is a station that can never be described nor even alluded to.

input: و فی مقام احببت ان اعرف کان الحقّ و الخلق فی ظلّه من الاوّل الّذی لا اوّل له الّا انّه مسبوق بالاوّلیّه الّتی لا تعرف بالاوّلیّه و بالعلّه الّتی لم یعرفها کلّ عالم علیم.
output: And in the station of I did wish to make Myself known, God was, and His creation had ever existed beneath His shelter from the beginning that hath no beginning, apart from its being preceded by a Firstness which cannot be regarded as firstness and originated by a Cause inscrutable even unto all men of learning.

input: قد کان ما کان و لم یکن مثل ما تراه الیوم.
output: That which hath been in existence had existed before, but not in the form thou seest today.

input: و ما کان تکوّن من الحراره المحدثه من امتزاج الفاعل و المنفعل.
output: The world of existence came into being through the heat generated from the interaction between the active force and that which is its recipient.

input: الّذی هو عینه و غیره.
output: These two are the same, yet they are different.

input: کذلک ینبئک النّبا الاعظم من هذا البنآء العظیم.
output: Thus doth the Great Announcement inform thee about this glorious structure.

input: انّ الفاعلین و المنفعلین قد خلقت من کلمه الله المطاعه و انّها هی علّه الخلق و ما سواها مخلوق معلول.
output: Such as communicate the generating influence and such as receive its impact are indeed created through the irresistible Word of God which is the Cause of the entire creation, while all else besides His Word are but the creatures and the effects thereof.

input: انّ ربّک لهو المبیّن الحکیم.
output: Verily thy Lord is the Expounder, the All-Wise.

input: ثمّ اعلم انّ کلام الله عزّ و جلّ اعلی و اجلّ من ان یکون ممّا تدرکه الحواسّ لانّه لیس بطبیعه و لا بجوهر.
output: Know thou, moreover, that the Word of God—exalted be His glory—is higher and far superior to that which the senses can perceive, for it is sanctified from any property or substance.

input: قد کان مقدّساً عن العناصر المعروفه و الاسطقسّات العوالی المذکوره.
output: It transcendeth the limitations of known elements and is exalted above all the essential and recognized substances.

input: و انّه ظهر من غیر لفظ و صوت و هو امر الله المهیمن علی العالمین.
output: It became manifest without any syllable or sound and is none but the Command of God which pervadeth all created things.

input: انّه ما انقطع عن العالم.
output: It hath never been withheld from the world of being.

input: و هو الفیض الاعظم الّذی کان علّه الفیوضات.
output: It is God's all-pervasive grace, from which all grace doth emanate.

input: و هو الکون المقدّس عمّا کان و ما یکون.
output: It is an entity far removed above all that hath been and shall be.

input: انّا لا نحبّ ان نفصّل هذا المقام لانّ آذان المعرضین ممدوده الینا لیستمعوا ما یعترضون به علی الله المهیمن القیّوم.
output: We are loath to enlarge on this subject, inasmuch as the unbelievers have inclined their ears towards Us in order to hear that which might enable them to cavil against God, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting.

input: لانّهم لا ینالون بسرّ العلم و الحکمه عمّا ظهر من مطلع نور الاحدیّه لذا یعترضون و یصیحون.
output: And since they are unable to attain to mysteries of knowledge and wisdom from what hath been unraveled by the Source of divine splendor, they rise in protest and burst into clamor.

input: و الحقّ ان یقال انّهم یعترضون علی ما عرفوه لا علی ما بیّنه المبیّن و انباه الحقّ علّام الغیوب.
output: But it is true to say that they object to that which they comprehend, not to the expositions given by the Expounder, nor the truths imparted by the One true God, the Knower of things unseen.

input: ترجع اعتراضاتهم کلّها علی انفسهم و هم لعمرک لا یفقهون.
output: Their objections, one and all, turn upon themselves, and I swear by thy life that they are devoid of understanding.

input: لا بدّ لکلّ امر من مبدا و لکلّ بنآء من بان.
output: Every thing must needs have an origin and every building a builder.

input: و انّه هذه العلّه الّتی سبقت الکون المزیّن بالطّراز القدیم مع تجدّده و حدوثه فی کلّ حین.
output: Verily, the Word of God is the Cause which hath preceded the contingent world—a world which is adorned with the splendors of the Ancient of Days, yet is being renewed and regenerated at all times.

input: تعالی الحکیم الّذی خلق هذا البنآء الکریم.
output: Immeasurably exalted is the God of Wisdom Who hath raised this sublime structure.

input: فانظر العالم و تفکّر فیه.
output: Look at the world and ponder a while upon it.

input: انّه یریک کتاب نفسه و ما سطر فیه من قلم ربّک الصّانع الخبیر.
output: It unveileth the book of its own self before thine eyes and revealeth that which the Pen of thy Lord, the Fashioner, the All-Informed, hath inscribed therein.

input: و یخبرک بما فیه و علیه و یفصح لک علی شان یغنیک عن کلّ مبیّن فصیح.
output: It will acquaint thee with that which is within it and upon it and will give thee such clear explanations as to make thee independent of every eloquent expounder.

input: قل انّ الطّبیعه بکینونتها مظهر اسمی المبتعث و المکوّن.
output: Say: Nature in its essence is the embodiment of My Name, the Maker, the Creator.

input: و قد تختلف ظهوراتها بسبب من الاسباب و فی اختلافها لآیات للمتفرّسین.
output: Its manifestations are diversified by varying causes, and in this diversity there are signs for men of discernment.

input: و هی الاراده و ظهورها فی رتبه الامکان.
output: Nature is God's Will and is its expression in and through the contingent world.

input: بنفس الامکان و انّها لتقدیر من مقدّر علیم.
output: It is a dispensation of Providence ordained by the Ordainer, the All-Wise.

input: و لو قیل انّها لهی المشیّه الامکانیّه لیس لاحد ان یعترض علیه.
output: Were anyone to affirm that it is the Will of God as manifested in the world of being, no one should question this assertion.

input: و قدّر فیها قدره عجز عن ادراک کنهها العالمون.
output: It is endowed with a power whose reality men of learning fail to grasp.

input: انّ البصیر لا یری فیها الّا تجلّی اسمنا المکوّن.
output: Indeed a man of insight can perceive naught therein save the effulgent splendor of Our Name, the Creator.

input: قل هذا کون لا یدرکه الفساد و تحیّرت الطّبیعه من ظهوره و برهانه و اشراقه الّذی احاط العالمین.
output: Say: This is an existence which knoweth no decay, and Nature itself is lost in bewilderment before its revelations, its compelling evidences and its effulgent glory which have encompassed the universe.

input: لیس لجنابک ان تلتفت الی قبل و بعد.
output: It ill beseemeth thee to turn thy gaze unto former or more recent times.

input: اذکر الیوم و ما ظهر فیه.
output: Make thou mention of this Day and magnify that which hath appeared therein.

input: انّ البیانات و الاشارات فی ذکر هذه المقامات تخمد حراره الوجود.
output: Indeed expositions and discourses in explanation of such things cause the spirits to be chilled.

input: لک ان تنطق الیوم بما تشتعل به الافئده و تطیر اجساد المقبلین.
output: It behooveth thee to speak forth in such wise as to set the hearts of true believers ablaze and cause their bodies to soar.

input: من یوقن الیوم بالخلق البدیع و یری الحقّ المنیع مهیمناً قیّوماً علیه انّه من اهل البصر فی هذا المنظر الاکبر.
output: Whoso firmly believeth today in the rebirth of man and is fully conscious that God, the Most Exalted, wieldeth supreme ascendancy and absolute authority over this new creation, verily such a man is reckoned with them that are endued with insight in this most great Revelation.

input: یشهد بذلک کلّ موقن بصیر.
output: Unto this beareth witness every discerning believer.

input: امش بقوّه الاسم الاعظم فوق العالم لتری اسرار القدم و تطّلع بما لا اطّلع به احد.
output: Walk thou high above the world of being through the power of the Most Great Name, that thou mayest become aware of the immemorial mysteries and be acquainted with that wherewith no one is acquainted.

input: انّ ربّک لهو المویّد العلیم الخبیر.
output: Verily, thy Lord is the Helper, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed.

input: کن نبّاضاً کالشّریان فی جسد الامکان لیحدث من الحراره المحدثه من الحرکه ما تسرع به افئده المتوقّفین.
output: Be thou as a throbbing artery, pulsating in the body of the entire creation, that through the heat generated by this motion there may appear that which will quicken the hearts of those who hesitate.

input: انّک عاشرت معی و رایت شموس سمآء حکمتی و امواج بحر بیانی اذ کنّا خلف سبعین الف حجاب من النّور.
output: At the time when We were hidden behind countless veils of light thou didst commune with Me and didst witness the luminaries of the heaven of My wisdom and the billows of the ocean of Mine utterance.

input: انّ ربّک لهو الصّادق الامین.
output: Verily thy Lord is the Truthful, the Faithful.

input: طوبی لمن فاز بفیضان هذا البحر فی ایّام ربّه الفیّاض الحکیم.
output: Great indeed is the blessedness of him who hath attained the liberal effusions of this ocean in the days of his Lord, the Most Bountiful, the All-Wise.

input: انّا بیّنّا لک اذ کنّا فی العراق فی بیت من سمّی بالمجید اسرار الخلیقه و مبداها و منتهاها و علّتها.
output: During Our sojourn in 'Iráq when We were at the house of one named Majíd, We set forth clearly for thee the mysteries of creation and the origin, the culmination and the cause thereof.

input: فلمّا خرجنا اقتصرنا البیان بانّه لا اله الّا انا الغفور الکریم.
output: However since Our departure We have limited Ourself to this affirmation: Verily, no God is there but Me, the Ever-Forgiving, the Bountiful.

input: کن مبلّغ امر الله ببیان تحدث به النّار فی الاشجار و تنطق انّه لا اله الّا انا العزیز المختار.
output: Teach thou the Cause of God with an utterance which will cause the bushes to be enkindled, and the call Verily, there is no God but Me, the Almighty, the Unconstrained to be raised therefrom.

input: قل انّ البیان جوهر یطلب النّفوذ و الاعتدال.
output: Say: Human utterance is an essence which aspireth to exert its influence and needeth moderation.

input: تفکّر فیما نزّل من سمآء مشیّه ربّک الفیّاض لتعرف ما اردناه فی غیاهب الآیات.
output: Meditate upon that which hath streamed forth from the heaven of the Will of thy Lord, He Who is the Source of all grace, that thou mayest grasp the intended meaning which is enshrined in the sacred depths of the Holy Writings.

input: انّ الّذین انکروا الله و تمسّکوا بالطّبیعه من حیث هی هی لیس عندهم من علم و لا من حکمه.
output: Those who have rejected God and firmly cling to Nature as it is in itself are, verily, bereft of knowledge and wisdom.

input: الا انّهم من الهائمین.
output: They are truly of them that are far astray.

input: اولئک ما بلغوا الذّروه العلیا و الغایه القصوی لذا سکّرت ابصارهم و اختلفت افکارهم والّا روسآء القوم اعترفوا بالله و سلطانه.
output: They have failed to attain the lofty summit and have fallen short of the ultimate purpose. therefore their eyes were shut and their thoughts differed, while the leaders among them have believed in God and in His invincible sovereignty.

input: یشهد بذلک ربّک المهیمن القیّوم.
output: Unto this beareth witness thy Lord, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting.

input: و لمّا ملئت عیون اهل الشّرق من صنائع اهل الغرب لذا هاموا فی الاسباب و غفلوا عن مسبّبها و ممدّها مع انّ الّذین کانوا مطالع الحکمه و معادنها ما انکروا علّتها و مبدعها و مبداها.
output: When the eyes of the people of the East were captivated by the arts and wonders of the West, they roved distraught in the wilderness of material causes, oblivious of the One Who is the Causer of Causes, and the Sustainer thereof, while such men as were the source and the wellspring of Wisdom never denied the moving Impulse behind these causes, nor the Creator or the Origin thereof.

input: انّ ربّک یعلم و النّاس اکثرهم لا یعلمون.
output: Thy Lord knoweth, yet most of the people know not.

input: و لنا ان نذکر فی هذا اللّوح بعض مقالات الحکمآء لوجه الله مالک الاسمآء لیفتح بها ابصار العباد و یوقننّ انّه هو الصّانع القادر المبدع المنشئ العلیم الحکیم.
output: Now We have, for the sake of God, the Lord of Names, set Ourself the task of mentioning in this Tablet some accounts of the sages, that the eyes of the people may be opened thereby and that they may become fully assured that He is in truth the Maker, the Omnipotent, the Creator, the Originator, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise.

input: ولو یری الیوم لحکمآء الارض ید طولی فی الحکمه و الصّنائع ولکن لو ینظر احد بعین البصیره لیعلم انّهم اخذوا اکثرها من حکمآء القبل و هم الّذین اسّسوا اساس الحکمه و مهّدوا بنیانها و شیّدوا ارکانها.
output: Although it is recognized that the contemporary men of learning are highly qualified in philosophy, arts and crafts, yet were anyone to observe with a discriminating eye he would readily comprehend that most of this knowledge hath been acquired from the sages of the past, for it is they who have laid the foundation of philosophy, reared its structure and reinforced its pillars.

input: کذلک ینبئک ربّک القدیم و القدمآء.
output: Thus doth thy Lord, the Ancient of Days, inform thee.
